text.title: vui-market-context Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: smart-home product decision — Matter primary, Home Assistant fallback.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Smart-home device product. Need broad multi-vendor reach; team considers Alexa + Matter + Home Assistant.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0; decision signs off. Engineering builds Matter primary; HA module ships month 3.
